field.provenance: Fresh generation from the exact Run-2 flavor set, criteria, fact ledger, and fielded original (INCLUDE_BASE). Generation agents stayed on the host default type so the run isolates judge execution policy; every judge surface ran as worldcup-judge.

qualityIndicators.gate: origin-failure disqualified for FABRICATION - the same flavor and violation family as Runs 1 and 2
qualityIndicators.gateCanary: clean: the fielded original passed the gate
qualityIndicators.trust: robust: champion gate-headline is also the rating leader (1702); final margin clear
qualityIndicators.tiebreaks: zero tiebreak jurors seated across the knockout

verdict.notes: Uninterrupted 363-agent generate-mode run on the Run-2 field family; 0 errors, 0 skipped. Capability: all 332 typed invocations (331 scoring judge surfaces plus the pre-generation sentinel) observed as worldcup-judge in persisted sidecars, 332 StructuredOutput calls, 0 ordinary tool calls counted across every typed transcript. Cost: every judge role ran at exactly 1.0 requests/invocation (Run 2 unrestricted: 1.04-1.41); judge-surface logical input fell 75.2% and output 24.6% vs the Run-2 judge baseline; whole-run logical input 15.44M -> 5.81M (-62.4%), output 2.89M -> 2.19M (-24.0%), requests 521 -> 419. The paired in-run tail measurement attributes the input collapse: all 31 default-type generation agents carried exactly 10,513 uncached input tokens on their first request while all 332 typed agents carried exactly 2 - the default agent's harness/tool-definition tail does not exist for the hermetic type. Quality: behavioral indicators matched the unrestricted baseline on a fresh field (same-flavor FABRICATION DQ for the third consecutive run, gate canary clean, trust verdict robust with champion = rating leader, zero fallback tiebreaks, fielded original in the same bottom quartile). Scope: one completed run, prose field, indicator-level evidence - not a head-to-head judging-quality benchmark (ADR 0001). Numbers are specific to this host, model, and connected-tool registry; the default-agent tail measured 9,222 in Run 1/2 sessions and 10,513 here at the same Claude Code version, so it tracks the session tool registry.
